title: Old Man
why_this_song: Old Man by Neil Young (1972) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Old man, look at my life"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Ah, one look in my eyes and you can tell that's true"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Live alone in a paradise"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Love lost, such a cost"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Rolling home to you"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Old man, look at my life
I'm a lot like you were
Old man, look at my life
I'm a lot like you were
Old man, take a look at my life, I'm a lot like you
I need someone to love me the whole day through
Ah, one look in my eyes and you can tell that's true

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "life" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "life" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "eyes" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "eyes" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Old man, look at my life

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm a lot like you were
But I'm all alone at last

exercises.prompt_en: "Old Man" was released in 1972. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Old Man" foi lançada em 1972. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Old Man" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Old Man" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
